column2: Verify Rejection of Invalid Trial Flight Request
column3: ['Submit an invalid trial flight request to the system. ', 'Verify that a TDA and consultation package are created based on the provided information. ', "Check if these documents do not meet CAA's requirements. ", 'Verify that both documents are rejected by the system. ']
column4: ['The request is submitted. ', 'Both documents are generated. ', "Documents fail to meet CAA's requirements. ", 'TDA and consultation package are marked as rejected. ']
